name: East Side Car & Limo Inc
registry_source: WA Secretary of State Corporations (via opengovwa.com UBI 603047557 — Eastside Towncar and Limousine LLC, Bellevue)
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate); FMCSA SAFER searches for 'East Side Car & Limo', 'East Side Car', 'East Side Limousine', and 'Eastside Limousine' returned no matches. The closest WA registry hit is Eastside Towncar and Limousine LLC (UBI 603047557, Bellevue 98008, formed 2010, administratively dissolved 2019) — entity name (LLC vs Inc), address (Bellevue vs Redmond 9407 176th Pl NE), and governors do not match the target Matveyev-family operator. Separately, Eastside Limousine Inc (Emil Matveyev, founded 1995, 19404 NE 68th Way Redmond, BBB-listed) appears to be the operating brand but its WA entity record was not retrievable. Target 'East Side Car & Limo Inc' at 9407 176th Pl NE may be a separate or now-defunct entity.
